titleStmt.title: SII 4.1334: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 1334. (A.R. No. 412 of 1893). ON THE SAME TIER.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śakava¨rṣamulu 1028 svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīpritvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara parama
bhaṭṭāraka ravikulatilaka cōḍakulaśēkhara pāṇḍyakulāṁtaka samastarājāśraya rājarājēṁdra vīramahēṁdra vikra
macōḍa vijayābharaṇa nijabhujavijitagaṁggākāvērīpa¨ryyaṁtagiridharitrīpati saptamōviṣṇuva¨rdhanulaina tribhuva
nacakrava¨rtti śrīkulōttuṁggacōḍadēvara prava¨rddhamānavijayarājyasaṁvatsaraṁbulu 37 gu śrāhi dina 338
cōḍamaṇḍalamuna nityavinōdavalanāṁṭi vennakōṭamuna kūvanūri vēnūruḍayā vēlāgiriyāṇḍiyaina rā
jarājamanittarayaṁḍu śrībhīmēśvaramahādēvarakuṁ beṭṭina Akhaṇḍava¨rtti lōhadaṇudiviya 1 ṇṭiki nācaṁdrā
¨rkkamu neyi sariyiṁpagalavārugā śrībhīmēśvaramahādēvara kilaramuna prolabōla nāvayayu kāṭabōyu
mayayu si dāmayayu cadukanā kommaya berasina nalvuru bōluṁ būṁṭagā Annabōla nūṁkani vasamu
na viḍcina Eḍlu 50 nityapaḍi golavaṁgala tribhuvanāṁkuśa nē māna 1 . likhitaṁ vīra rājēṁdracōḍa Āca¨ryyaḥ .
Digital edition of SII 4.1334 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
